name: Criminal Defense Intake
description: Criminal defense intake for criminal defense attorneys and legal staff conducting the initial intake of a new criminal defense matter. Evaluates the charges, the procedural posture, the client's custodial status, the constitutional rights implicated, the bail and detention status, and the immediate defense needs to produce a criminal defense intake profile with immediate action requirements. Not legal advice.

privacy.disclosure: A summary of this session will be available for review.
